name: Chili Rico
recipeIngredient: 1 can Whole tomatoes (28 oz can), undrained, coarsely chopped
2 cans Kidney beans (16 oz each), rinsed and drained
1 can Whole kernel corn (12 oz can), drained
1 Red or green bell pepper, cut into 1/2-inch slices.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic in oil in a large saucepan or Dutch oven until the onion is tender but not brown.
2. Add all remaining ingredients except red pepper and optional toppings; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 20 minutes.
4. Stir in red pepper; continue to simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until desired consistency.
5. Ladle into bowls; top as desired and serve with additional picante sauce. Makes 6 servings, about 7 1/2 cups chili.
6. This meat-free chili is lightly seasoned with cinnamon. Its uniquely flavorful profile and low fat and calorie counts make it a favorite of the fitness set.
